headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://hcaptcha.com https://*.hcaptcha.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://res.cloudinary.com https://images.unsplash.com https://hcaptcha.com https://*.hcaptcha.com; connect-src 'self' https://api.epasaley.com https://hcaptcha.com https://*.hcaptcha.com; frame-src https://hcaptcha.com https://*.hcaptcha.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'
